final:
module ALU (
    input [15:0] A,
    input [15:0] B,
    input [2:0] opcode,
    output reg [15:0] result
);
    always @(*) begin
        case (opcode)
            3'b000: result = A + B;        // Addition
            3'b001: result = A - B;        // Subtraction
            3'b010: result = A & B;        // AND
            3'b011: result = A | B;        // OR
            3'b100: result = ~A;           // NOT
            default: result = 16'b0;       // Default case
        endcase
    end
endmodule
